metadata.title: SYNGO_BP_1656
metadata.comment: Rationale: Fig2 shows that in the developing calyx synapse of Septin 5 null mice there are more vesicles associated with the active zone (Fig2 E, G, H & I) at the age of P8-9. This difference is gone in mature calyx synapses at P16-18 (Fig2 F-I). This phenotype is mirrored by an enhanced evoked response, larger RRP and less synaptic decay in immature calyx synapses of Septin 5 null animals (Fig3). The lack of phenotype in neurosecretion in adult animals is also reported in hippocampus (see additional ref 11739749).. Experimental description: M&M" "Brainstem slices were prepared from P8-P19 mice of wild-type and Sept5 knockout genotype (CD1 strain)."
